text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 24 

DME_PRMRY_PMT 

LABEL: Durable Medical Equipment Primary Payer Amount 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates the total amount paid for Part B durable medical equipment (DME) by a primary 
payer other than Medicare for a given year. Claims for DME are a subset of the claims in the Part B 
carrier and DME data files. 

These claim lines are defined as those with a line BETOS
